abort.already_in_progress: A setup is already in progress for this integration

error.cannot_connect_slots: Bluetooth adapter or proxy has no free connection slots and the controller is not visible in discovery. Wait and retry, close other mobile apps using the controller, check Settings → Bluetooth → Connection monitor, or add a Bluetooth proxy closer to the controller.

user.title: Controller setup
user.description: Select your Solem BL-IP controller and the number of stations. Scheduling and rain skip belong in Home Assistant automations.

reconfigure.description: Update the station count. To replace the physical controller, remove and add the integration again.

bluetooth_confirm.description: Set up {name} and choose the number of stations.

controller_off_days.name: Turn off controller for selected days

cannot_connect.message: Could not connect to the controller over Bluetooth.

start_irrigation_failed.message: Failed to start irrigation on station {station}.

controller_on_failed.message: Failed to turn the controller on.

controller_off_failed.message: Failed to turn the controller off.

controller_off_days_failed.message: Failed to turn the controller off for the selected number of days.

bluetooth_unavailable.title: Bluetooth connection unavailable
bluetooth_unavailable.description: Home Assistant could not poll controller {mac} over Bluetooth after several attempts. Check that the controller is powered on, in range, and not connected to another app.
